mnm_layout_override.desc: Has product-specific layouts that override global setting. Applicable only for Mix and Mat

mnm_layout.desc: Single-product details page layout. Applicable only for Mix and Match type products.

mnm_form_location.desc: Single-product details page add to cart form location. Applicable only for Mix and Match t

mnm_content_source.desc: Source of child products. Applicable only for Mix and Match type products.

mnm_child_category_ids.desc: List of child categories allowed in this product.

mnm_child_items.desc: List of child items contained in this product.

mnm_discount.desc: Indicates the percentage discount to apply to each child product when per-product pricing

mnm_priced_per_product.desc: Indicates whether the container price is calculated from the price of the selected child p

mnm_packing_mode.desc: Indicates how the child products are packed/shipped.

mnm_shipped_per_product.desc: Deprecated: Indicates whether the child products are shipped individually.
